message:
feat: copy files via exec for Apple Container (no cp command)

- Apple Container doesn't have 'cp' command
- Use 'exec' with base64 encoding to write files
- Read file on host, encode, pipe through base64 -d in container
- Avoids shell escaping issues with base64
- Docker/Podman continue using cp command
- Fixes file copying for .claude.json, .gitconfig, gh hosts.yml
